mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE metrics.TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select:
SELECT TIME as time, CPU_RATE as cpuRate, CPU_USAGE_MHZ as cpuUsage, MEMORY_RATE as memoryRate, HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE as hugepageMemRate, VM_GROUP_MEM_RATE as vmGroupMemRate, OVS_GROUP_MEM_RATE as ovsGroupMemRate, HOST_ID as hostId, HOST_POOL_ID as hostpoolId, CLUSTER_ID as clusterId, OP_GROUP_CODE as operatorGroupCode, OP_GROUP_ID as operatorGroupId, FLOW_STAT as flowStat, BUFFER_RATE as bufferRate, CACHED_RATE as cachedRate, SWAP_RATE as swapRate,HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL as hugepageMemoryTotal,FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE as flexibleHugepageMemoryRate, HUGEPAGE_STATUS as hugepageStatus, OVS_ISOLATED_MEM as ovsIsolatedMem, VM_ISOLATED_MEM as vmIsolatedMem, FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL as flexibleHugepageMemoryTotal FROM TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND HOST_ID=${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
AND CLUSTER_ID in (${clusterIds})
ORDER BY ${sortField} ASC
ORDER BY ${sortField} DESC

select
tdio.CPU_RATE as cpuRate,
tdio.MEMORY_RATE as memoryRate,
t.name as hostName, t.minTime as minTime, tdio.HOST_ID as hostId, tdio.TIME as time from (SELECT
SUM(CPU_RATE) sumcpu,
SUM(MEMORY_RATE) sumcpu,
HOST_ID, H.name, MIN(TIME) minTime FROM TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL C , ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOST} H WHERE C.HOST_ID = H.id
AND C.OP_GROUP_CODE LIKE #{operatorGroupCode}
AND C.HOST_POOL_ID =${hostPoolId}
AND C.CLUSTER_ID =${clusterId}
AND C.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} GROUP BY C.HOST_ID,H.name ORDER BY sumcpu DESC LIMIT ${limit}) t left join TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL tdio on t.HOST_ID=tdio.HOST_ID WHERE tdio.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} ORDER BY t.name, tdio.TIME

select d.TIME as time,
ROUND(SUM(d.cpuUSED)/SUM(d.cpuWHOLE),2) as cpuRate
if (SUM(d.hugepageMemoryWHOLE) == 0, 0, ROUND(SUM(d.hugepageMemoryUSED) / SUM(d.hugepageMemoryWHOLE), 2)) AS hugepageMemRate, SUM(d.hugepageMemoryWHOLE) as hugepageMemoryTotal
if (SUM(d.flexibleHugepageMemoryWHOLE) == 0, 0, ROUND(SUM(d.flexibleHugepageMemoryUSED) / SUM(d.flexibleHugepageMemoryWHOLE), 2)) AS flexibleHugepageMemoryRate, SUM(d.flexibleHugepageMemoryWHOLE) as flexibleHugepageMemoryTotal
ROUND(SUM(d.memoryUSED)/SUM(d.memoryWHOLE),2) as memoryRate
FROM (select detail.TIME as TIME,
detail.CPU_RATE* host.cpu cpuUSED, host.cpu cpuWHOLE,
detail.HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE* detail.HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL hugepageMemoryUSED, detail.HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL hugepageMemoryWHOLE,
detail.FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE* detail.FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL flexibleHugepageMemoryUSED, detail.FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL flexibleHugepageMemoryWHOLE,
detail.MEMORY_RATE* host.memory memoryUSED, host.memory memoryWHOLE,
cluster.id AS CLUSTER_ID FROM
${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOSTPOOL}
${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_CLUSTER}
cluster, (SELECT TIME, HOST_ID,
AVG(CPU_RATE) as CPU_RATE
AVG(HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE) as HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE, AVG(HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL) as HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL
AVG(FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE) as FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE, AVG(FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL) as FLEXIBLE_HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL
AVG(MEMORY_RATE) as MEMORY_RATE
FROM TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_POOL_ID=${hostPoolId}
AND CLUSTER_ID =${clusterId}
group by HOST_ID,TIME ) detail inner join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOST} host on detail.HOST_ID=host.id ) d WHERE
d.CLUSTER_ID=${hostPoolId}
d.CLUSTER_ID =${clusterId}
group by d.CLUSTER_ID, d.TIME ORDER BY TIME ASC

SELECT SUM(HOST.cpu) AS wholeCpu, SUM(HOST.memory) AS wholeMemory, SUM(detail.CPU_RATE * HOST.cpu)/100 AS cpuUsed, SUM(detail.MEMORY_RATE * HOST.memory)/100 AS memUsed FROM TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL AS detail LEFT JOIN ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOST} AS HOST ON detail.HOST_ID = HOST.id GROUP BY TIME ORDER BY TIME DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT distinct TIME FROM TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL GROUP BY TIME ORDER BY TIME DESC LIMIT 1,1

select d.CLUSTER_ID AS id, any(cluster.name) AS name,
SUM(d.USED)/ SUM(d.WHOLE) AS cpuRate
SUM(d.USED)/ SUM(d.WHOLE) AS reservedHugepageMemoryRate
SUM(d.USED)/ SUM(d.WHOLE) AS memoryRate
from ( select detail.HOST_ID AS HOST_ID, any(host.cluster_id) AS CLUSTER_ID,
AVG(detail.CPU_RATE) * any(host.cpu) AS USED, any(host.cpu) AS WHOLE
AVG(detail.HUGEPAGE_MEM_RATE) * any(detail.HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL) AS USED , any(detail.HUGEPAGE_MEMORY_TOTAL) AS WHOLE
AVG(detail.MEMORY_RATE) * any(host.memory) AS USED , any(host.memory) AS WHOLE
from TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL detail, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOST} host where detail.HOST_ID = host.id
AND detail.HUGEPAGE_STATUS = 1
AND detail.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} group by detail.HOST_ID ) d, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_CLUSTER} cluster WHERE d.CLUSTER_ID = cluster.id
AND cluster.name in (${clusterNames})
group by d.CLUSTER_ID

select any(cluster.name) AS name, d.CLUSTER_ID AS id, SUM(d.CPUUSED)/ SUM(d.CPU) AS cpuRate, SUM(d.MEMUSED)/ SUM(d.MEMORY) AS memoryRate, IFNULL(any(cluster.ha_cpu_retain), 0) AS haCpuRetain, IFNULL(any(cluster.ha_mem_retain), 0) AS haMemRetain from ( select detail.HOST_ID AS HOST_ID, any(host.cluster_id) AS CLUSTER_ID, AVG(detail.MEMORY_RATE) * any(host.memory) AS MEMUSED, any(host.memory) AS MEMORY, AVG(detail.CPU_RATE) * any(host.cpu) AS CPUUSED, any(host.cpu) AS CPU from TBL_HOST_CPU_MEM_DETAIL detail, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOST} host where detail.HOST_ID = host.id AND detail.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} group by detail.HOST_ID ) d, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_CLUSTER} cluster WHERE d.CLUSTER_ID = cluster.id AND cluster.enable_ha = 1
AND cluster.name in (${clusterNames})
group by d.CLUSTER_ID
